widgetData.source_sentence: how do i change the password for the app store?
sentences: Tap Settings > [your name] > Password & Security. Tap Change Password. Enter your current password or device passcode, then enter a new password and confirm the new password. Tap Change or Change Password.

The mole allows scientists to calculate the number of elementary entities (usually atoms or molecules) in a certain mass of a given substance. Avogadro's number is an absolute number: there are 6.022×1023 elementary entities in 1 mole. This can also be written as 6.022×1023 mol-1.

widgetData.source_sentence: how is baking powder and baking soda different?
sentences: While both products appear similar, they're certainly not the same. Baking soda is sodium bicarbonate, which requires an acid and a liquid to become activated and help baked goods rise. Conversely, baking powder includes sodium bicarbonate, as well as an acid. It only needs a liquid to become activated.
